resultList.dtldesc: Discover your ideal family home with this charming 3 BHK residential house for sale in Chandkheda, Ahmedabad. Offering a blend of comfort and practicality, this property provides a perfect setting for contemporary living in a vibrant and well-connected neighborhood.   Property Specifications    This beautifully furnished 3 BHK residential house for sale in Chandkheda, Ahmedabad, offers a comfortable and stylish living experience with a super built-up area of 1300 sqft. The property is spread across ground and first floors, plus a terrace, providing ample space and flexibility.   On the ground floor, youll find a cozy bedroom, a common western-style bathroom equipped with a geyser, a spacious living room, a dining area, and a modular kitchen with an internal staircase leading to the upper floors. The modular kitchen is well-equipped with a chimney, piped gas connection, and an attached utility area.   The first floor features two additional bedrooms, one of which includes a balcony with a road view. This level also includes a common western-style bathroom with a geyser. The open terrace adds a delightful outdoor space for relaxation and enjoyment.   The house is designed with Vastu compliance and faces north, ensuring positive energy flow. Vitrified tiles throughout the flooring add to the modern appeal and durability of the home. This well-maintained property could mbines functionality with aesthetics, making it an excellent choice for your next home.   Facilities    The property offers excellent facilities for a comfortable living experience. It includes 1 open parking space and 3 covered parking spaces for your vehicles. Water supply is available, ensuring consistent access. The house benefits from a 100 power backup facility, providing uninterrupted service. Security is enhanced with a dedicated security guard and CCTV surveillance installed throughout the premises.   Locality    The property is ideally situated in Chandkheda, Ahmedabad, with Satyamev Hospital as a prominent landmark. Schools are conveniently located within a kilometer, making education easily accessible. Nearby malls and supermarkets provide ample shopping options, while banks and ATMs are also close by for your financial needs. Public transport is readily available, enhancing connectivity. The Sabarmati Railway Station is 3 km away, and Chandkheda Railway Station is just 1 km from the property, ensuring easy travel options.
